unverified_claims: 20-40% energy reduction from smart building digital twins — this range is cited across multiple industry case studies but no single peer-reviewed meta-analysis was located
PTC ThingWorx and Dassault Systèmes specific market share percentages — major sources describe market as 'highly fragmented' with no single player above 2%; precise share data is behind paywalls
Search volume ~110,000/month — based on keyword research estimates for 'digital twin' and related terms; precise figure would require SEMrush/Ahrefs verification
